---
title: "MTW: Linearized Gravity & Gravitational Waves"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

# MTW: Linearized Gravity & Gravitational Waves

This tutorial follows **Misner, Thorne, and Wheeler's *Gravitation* (Chapter 18)**.
We will implement linearized gravity and derive the wave equation.

!!! info "Project Profile for AI Agents (LLM TL;DR)"
    - **Goal**: Implement linearized gravity and derive wave equation.
    - **Reference**: MTW, *Gravitation*, Chapter 18.
    - **Status**: Placeholder.

## 1. Setup

```{julia}
using xAct
using Plots
using LinearAlgebra
```

## 2. Implementation

(Full implementation coming soon)

## Next Steps

- **Carroll**: Review [Schwarzschild Geodesics](carroll_schwarzschild_julia.md).
- **Cosmology**: See [Wald: FLRW Cosmology](wald_cosmology_julia.md).
